KGiSL Institute of Technology (An Autonomous Institution) Affiliated to Anna University, Approved by AICTE, Recognized by UGC, Accredited by NAAC & NBA (B.E-CSE,B.E-ECE, B.Tech-IT), 365, KGiSL Campus, Thudiyalur Road, Saravanampatti, Coimbatore - 641035. END SEMESTER EXAMINATIONS-APR/MAY 2025 Regulation-2021 | Programme(s) | Semester | Course Code | Course Title | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | COMMON TO ALL
B.E&B.B.TECH | II | 24UCS271 | PROGRAMMING IN C | Time: Three Hours Max:100 Marks PART - A (10 x 2 = 20 Marks) | | Answer All Questions | RBT Level | CO | Marks | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | 1. | "Keywords cannot be used as Identifiers"-Justify the correctness of the statement.
Keywords cannot be used as Identifiers – Because keywords are reserved words in C with predefined meanings and uses in the language syntax. | U | CO1 | 2 | | 2. | Specify the use of preprocessor directive.
It instructs the compiler to process certain instructions before actual compilation starts, like #include or #define. | R | CO1 | 2 | | 3. | Write the value stored in variable var in the following string operations statement in C language
var=strcmp("Hello", "World")
Value of var = strcmp("Hello", "World") – A negative value (because "Hello" is lexicographically less than "World"). | U | CO2 | 2 | | 4. | Give an example for initialization of a 2D array with a set of values.
int arr[2][2] = {{1, 2}, {3, 4}}; | U | CO2 | 2 | | 5. | Define the term recursion in C Language.
It is a function calling itself directly or indirectly to solve a problem. | R | CO3 | 2 |

pages.content:
Part-A
Answer all the following

1) Keywords are cannot be used as Identifiers, they are the predefined words meaning of reserved words in C.
eg: int, float, double.

2) It is used to improve the quality, reliability, readability and manage the compilation process.

3) it is used to string compare function check whether the "hello" and "world" are same or not also, the value will be 0 or negative.

4) int arr[2][2] = { {1, 6}, {3, 7} }

5) Recursion is the term defined as the function which call by itself to satisfy the given condition as true.

CONTENT:
Part-A
Answer all the following

1) Keywords are cannot be used as Identifiers, they are the predefined words meaning of reserved words in C.
eg: int, float, double.

2) It is used to improve the quality, reliability, readability and manage the compilation process.

3) it is used to string compare function check whether the "hello" and "world" are same or not also, the value will be 0 or negative.

4) int arr[2][2] = { {1, 6}, {3, 7} }

5) Recursion is the term defined as the function which call by itself to satisfy the given condition as true.
